final_prompt.prompt:
Edit the logo image (reference #1) to look as if it is written with soy sauce, matching the liquid soy sauce brushstroke style shown in reference #2, viewed from a top-down angle.

Style/medium: photorealistic top-view food photography style
Composition: top-down (overhead) angle, logo text as the main element
Subject: the logo from reference #1, rewritten/rendered as if drawn with soy sauce liquid
Scene/backdrop: flat surface viewed from above, consistent with reference #2
Lighting/mood:
Color palette: soy sauce dark brown tones for the lettering
Materials/textures: liquid soy sauce texture, wet glossy brushstroke appearance matching reference #2
Text (verbatim):
Constraints:
  preserve the original logo letterforms from reference #1
  soy sauce liquid style must match reference #2
Avoid: dry or matte strokes; 3D perspective angles
